# R2F Trading — Professional ICT Coaching & Mentorship

> R2F Trading (Road 2 Funded) is a professional ICT (Inner Circle Trader) coaching and mentorship program run by Harvest Wright, offering personalized one-on-one trading education.

## About
- Website: https://r2ftrading.com
- Mentor: Harvest Wright, 10+ years ICT trading experience
- Services: 1-on-1 ICT trading coaching, mentorship programs
- Achievements: TradingView Editors' Pick, Top 1% in trading competitions, FTMO Challenge passed

## Services & Pricing
- Lite Coaching Plan: $150/week — 1 weekly session (60-90 min), templates, action plans, direct Telegram/WhatsApp support
- Pro Coaching Plan: $200/week — 2 weekly sessions, live market walkthroughs, recorded sessions, advanced resources
- Full Mentorship Program: $1,000/4 months — comprehensive 6-month program, psychological coaching, custom trading plan, complimentary FTMO Challenge

## What We Teach
- ICT (Inner Circle Trader) Concepts: order blocks, fair value gaps, liquidity, market structure, killzones, breaker blocks
- Trading Psychology: mindset mastery, emotional discipline, handling losing streaks
- Risk Management: position sizing, risk-to-reward, funded account management
- Trading System Development: personalized strategy creation
- Funded Account Strategies: prop firm challenge preparation, scaling funded accounts
